goal: Build two-zone CodyMaster site: 7 HTML landing pages at cody.todyle.com + VitePress docs at cody.todyle.com/docs with bidirectional navigation and shared design tokens
decisions: VitePress base MUST stay '/docs/' — Cloudflare Pages constraint
All landing pages use partial injection pattern (components.js) not inline header/footer
index.html is the refactored codymaster-landing.html monolith
Phase A (HTML pages) before Phase B (VitePress theme sync)
Content extracted from codymaster-landing.html sections then expanded per page
first_tasks: 1.2 Replace inline header block with cm-header-mount div
1.3 Replace inline footer block with cm-footer-mount div
